api_football.note: fixtures, odds, squads, standings, H2H endpoints available from MVP verification

fifa_rank.note: rank values from crawl/snapshot path; refresh before final use

elo.note: locally computed from international results CSV snapshot

local_snapshots.note: sample card only; no external API called by checker

first_seen_odds_proxy.note: First observed W1 snapshot; not official opening odds.

standings.summary: Pre-tournament group table not final enough for match importance beyond round metadata.

recent_form.summary: Recent national team fixtures can be pulled from api-football team fixture endpoint.

h2h.summary: Endpoint returned no direct recent H2H, which is an acceptable empty result.

injuries.summary: Injury endpoint available; current sample has no listed injuries.

suspensions.summary: No independent suspension endpoint verified; use injury endpoint plus manual confirmation.

weather.summary: Open-Meteo forecast path available for venue coordinates.

travel_distance.summary: Travel estimate is available only after venue coordinate normalization and base-camp assumptions.

risk_flags.message: Referee not yet assigned in source snapshot.
Suspension data is partial and must be manually reviewed before any W1_PLAY.
Travel distance is estimated from partial venue/base assumptions and does not block analysis.

data_gaps.message: Confirmed starting lineups are not available yet; hard rule requires W1_WAIT.
Referee field is not assigned yet; keep as risk flag, not a blocker.

decision.label: W1_WAIT
reasons: Confirmed lineup is missing, so hard rule forces W1_WAIT.
Required 1X2, AH, and OU markets are present.
Suspensions and travel distance are partial but non-blocking risk flags.
